title: Simple Display Items
description: A simple datapack geared towards server admins that allows you to easily disable interaction with an item, make it float, and make it immune to fire.
body:
# Simple Display Items
A simple datapack that allows you to disable interaction with an item, make it float, and make it immune to fire.

## Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/QJ9RBMGaqn0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

*(Watch on YouTube for better quality)*

## Usage
First run the following command:
```
/function sdi:craft/craft_papers
```
This will give you two papers, one called "Display On" and one called "Display Off". 

To put an item in "display mode", throw the item on the block you want, then throw the "Display On" paper on top. If you see green particles, then it worked.

To take an item out of display mode, simply throw the "Display Off" paper at the item, and you can immediately pick it up.

### ❗WARNING❗
Items are *not* immune to explosions for now. This may change in the near future.

## ⚙️ Optional Crafting Recipe
There is a built in crafting recipe that is disabled by default. To enable it, unzip the datapack and navigate to:
```
data/sdi/recipes/papers.json.disabled
```
Rename the file to just "papers.json". (If you are on windows, you may need to enable file extensions. You can learn how to do so [here](https://www.howtogeek.com/205086/beginner-how-to-make-windows-show-file-extensions/))

Once you finish this and reload with "/reload", the papers can be crafted by all players with the following recipe:\
![Crafting Recipe](https://file.garden/YK55Rqs3-AHC5Tk9/simple_display_items_recipe.png)

You can also replace the recipe with any recipe you want, as long as the file is still called "papers.json".
